question: How many different customers have ordered things?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Orders.customer_id) FROM Orders JOIN Customers ON Orders.customer_id = Customers.customer_id;

semantic.reason: 语义一致，SQL反向翻译描述准确表达了原始问题'How many different customers have ordered things?'的意图，即统计不同客户的数量，且未涉及额外的过滤、分组或排序条件。
